rules.rule_text:
rule CrowdStrike_PutterPanda_04 : pngdowner putterpanda
{
	meta:
		description = "PUTTER PANDA - PNGDOWNER"
		date = "2014-03-30"
		version = "1.0"
		in_the_wild = true
		copyright = "CrowdStrike, Inc."
		actor = "PUTTER PANDA"

	strings:
		$myagent = "myAgent"
		$readfile = "read file error:"
		$downfile = "down file success"
		$avail = "Avaliable data:%u bytes"

	condition:
		3 of them
}
